calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-04-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Defendants Answer To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CHAJINEL HOME SERVICES INC. and DANIELA VALENZUELA's Motion To Amend Defendants Answer To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' "motion to amend answer to plaintiff's first amended complaint" is granted.

"That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) A proposed amendment's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.) Defendants do not show that one more affirmative defense (the 23rd) will require significant added investigation.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2022 Set For Trial On Mar-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
